skills.title: Data Analysis & Reporting
skills.description: Operational data analysis, reporting and monitoring of key metrics (SLA, incidents, performance).

skills.title: IT Operations & Systems
skills.description: Operational management in corporate environments: users, access control, incidents and advanced technical support.

skills.title: Networking & Connectivity
skills.description: Diagnosis and support of network infrastructure and distributed environments.

skills.title: Incident Management & Operations
skills.description: Ticketing, escalation, service quality and operational reporting.

education.title: Master's — Big Data Analytics & Generative Artificial Intelligence

experience.position: Advanced Support Technician | Operational Data Analysis
bullets: Operational data analysis of incidents in critical corporate environments (Madrid public sector).
Monitoring SLA, resolution times and ticket volume through reporting in Excel and Power BI.
Monthly and yearly productivity reports for a team of 12 agents (~300 tickets/day).
Identification of incident patterns and operational bottlenecks to improve resolution times.
Management of complex incidents, access control and VIP user support.
Operational coordination of a 12-agent team: planning, tracking and performance improvement.
Service quality analysis through call monitoring and process evaluation.
Development of reports and dashboards in Power BI for operational metrics.
Analysis of large ticketing datasets (FARO, 10,000+ records) for reporting and comparisons.
Custom SQL queries to optimize reporting and extract key service indicators.

experience.position: IT Support in Critical Operations (Fire Department)
bullets: Support for critical systems and applications (SITREM, APPB mobile).
Resolution of network and connectivity incidents (proxy, subnets, communications).
Technical support in environments with direct impact on emergency operations.
Advanced support in Microsoft corporate environments (M365, VPN, proxy).
Incident management and escalation based on criticality.
Basic analysis of recurring incidents and coordination with technical teams.
IT support in logistics environment managing systems, devices and operations.
RFID systems and mobile device management (deployment, support, maintenance).
Access and permissions management in Azure and corporate ticketing systems.
Coordination with Inditex on RFID tunnels and product security projects.
Training and onboarding of new team members.
Development of a full-stack application for data analysis (Java / Spring Boot / HTML / CSS).
MongoDB database design and implementation.

projects.name: Professional Profile Management System (CMS + Netlify)
projects.description: Web platform for managing professional content using a decoupled architecture (JSON + frontend), with admin panel and automated deployment. Designed as a lightweight CMS-like system.

projects.name: IT Operations & SLA Analytics Platform
projects.description: Data analysis system focused on monitoring IT operations, including incident volume, resolution times and SLA metrics using SQL, Python and data visualization.

projects.name: AI Technical Knowledge Copilot (RAG)
projects.description: AI-based system for querying technical documentation using Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), designed to improve knowledge access and operational efficiency in IT environments.

hero.title: Data Analyst with a background in IT Operations and Systems
hero.subtitle: Analysis of IT operations in corporate environments, working with incidents, SLA and service metrics to improve operational efficiency. Experience in reporting, SQL queries and Python-based automation, applying Data Analytics and Business Intelligence practices.
